name: PER_DEPT_TREE_NODE_RF_V
query: ( SELECT TREE_STRUCTURE_CODE, TREE_CODE, TREE_VERSION_ID, RF_TREE_NODE_ID, TREE_NODE_ID, DATA_SOURCE_ID, TO_NUMBER(PK1_VALUE) ORGANIZATION_ID, TO_DATE(PK2_VALUE,'YYYY-MM-DD') EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, TO_DATE(PK3_VALUE,'YYYY-MM-DD') EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, TREE_LABEL_ID, ANCESTOR_TREE_NODE_ID, ANCESTOR_DATA_SOURCE_ID, TO_NUMBER(ANCESTOR_PK1_VALUE ) ANCESTOR_ORGANIZATION_ID, TO_DATE(ANCESTOR_PK2_VALUE ,'YYYY-MM-DD') ANCESTOR_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, TO_DATE(ANCESTOR_PK3_VALUE,'YYYY-MM-DD') ANCESTOR_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, ANCESTOR_TREE_LABEL_ID, DISTANCE, IS_LEAF, CREATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM PER_DEPT_TREE_NODE_RF )
